message:
chore(artifacts): add verification evidence for benchmark, interference, and parser rerun runs

Captures structured verification artifacts from 11 gate runs:
- constrained_ambient_benchmark_lane (4 runs: T191624Z–T195228Z)
- controller_interference (2 runs: T200013Z, T202958Z)
- frx_04_3_hybrid_lane_router_guards (1 run: T192516Z)
- parser_third_party_rerun_kit (4 runs: T192947Z–T195856Z)

Each run includes commands.txt, events.jsonl, and run_manifest.json
providing an auditable record of gate verdicts and timing data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
